name: vercel-ai-web-preview
title: Web Preview
author: Vercel
description: A sandboxed web renderer with URL state, navigation controls, and console output.

changes: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases.
Removed allow-same-origin from the iframe sandbox to keep script previews isolated.
Added reduced-motion handling and logical text alignment for RTL.

modifications.change: Changed Vercel workspace-local shadcn imports to standard consumer aliases. Removed allow-same-origin from the iframe sandbox to keep script previews isolated. Added reduced-motion handling and logical text alignment for RTL.
modifications.reason: Keep the copied component portable and meet security, accessibility, reduced-motion, and RTL requirements without changing its product role.
